scripts.dev:server: npm run build:client && cd server && npm run start
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:worker
scripts.build:railway: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:pages
scripts.deploy:pages: cd client && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=telefonchik
